summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of NEW Integration Features: Product Catalog page, Integration Settings page, Store Feed API, External APIs with API Key auth. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - Products page, Integration page, Link Video modal, and Home page feature cards all working correctly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All new pages and features working

seed_data_creation: Test data (TEST_UI_Product, TEST_UI_App key) created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new integration features tested and working. Existing data includes: 1 product 'Health Supplement Bundle' (published to store) and 1 API key 'Affiliate Pro' with full permissions. Store feed API is PUBLIC (no auth required). External APIs require X-API-Key header. Products flow: Create → Link Video → Publish → Store feed displays it.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/external/products - returns products with valid key
GET /api/external/videos - returns videos with valid key
POST /api/external/products - creates product with valid key (auto-publishes)
frontend_ui_tests: Products page loads with header, subtitle, Add Product button
Products page - clicking Add Product shows form with all fields
Products page - create product with name, link, price, category works
Products page - product card shows name, price, status badge, action buttons
Products page - 'In Store' badge visible for published products
Products page - Link Video button opens modal with available videos
Products page - modal shows video options with Link buttons
Products page - Publish/Unpublish button toggles correctly
Integration page loads with Quick Start guide
Integration page - Endpoint URLs card shows 3 endpoints with copy buttons
Integration page - API Keys section shows existing keys
Integration page - New Key button opens creation form
Integration page - Form has app name input and permission checkboxes
Integration page - Creating API key adds new key card
Navbar - Products and Connect links present
Home page - Product Catalog feature card present
Home page - Connect Your Apps feature card present
